2605.30720.title: Kalimati Vegetable Price Index Forecasting with a Momentum Corrected Online Stacking Ensemble
2605.30720.paper_summary: Forecasting agricultural commodity prices in emerging economies is difficult due to high volatility, frequent supply disruptions, and strong cultural influences on demand. This study introduces the Kalimati Vegetable Price Index (KVPI), a new inverse-volatility weighted composite index that aggregates 135 daily wholesale commodities from Kathmandu over ten years (2013-2023). By creating a stable macro-level signal, the KVPI reduces the noise inherent in modelling individual crops. A rich set of 64 causally valid features was developed, including festival lead-lag effects, rolling statistics, and calendar variables. Fourteen forecasting models spanning statistical, tree-based, deep learning, hybrid, and transformer architectures were rigorously evaluated across short (7-day), medium (14- and 30-day), and long-term (90-day) horizons. Tree-based ensembles proved notably robust, while classical statistical models and complex transformers struggled with the noisy dataset. The proposed Momentum-Corrected Online Stacking Ensemble achieved the strongest performance, yielding a Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) of 1.771, an exceptionally low Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE) of 0.68%, and explaining 84.5% of the variance (R-squared = 0.845) at the 90-day horizon. This open-source pipeline provides policymakers and supply chain actors in Nepal and similar markets with a practical, reliable tool for anticipating price movements and strengthening food security.
2605.30720.paper_summary_zh: 預測新興經濟體的農產品價格是困難的，因為這些市場具有高度波動性、頻繁的供應中斷，以及對需求的強烈文化影響。這項研究介紹了卡利馬提蔬菜價格指數（KVPI），這是一個新的逆波動加權綜合指數，匯總了2013年至2023年間加德滿都的135種每日批發商品。通過創建一個穩定的宏觀信號，KVPI減少了建模單一作物時固有的噪音。開發了一組豐富的64個因果有效特徵，包括節慶的滯後效應、滾動統計和日曆變數。對於短期（7天）、中期（14天和30天）和長期（90天）的預測模型，對十四種模型進行了嚴格評估，這些模型涵蓋了統計、基於樹的、深度學習、混合和Transformer架構。基於樹的集成模型顯示出特別的穩健性，而傳統的統計模型和複雜的Transformer在噪音數據集上表現不佳。所提出的動量修正在線堆疊集成模型達到了最佳性能，根均方誤差（RMSE）為1.771，平均絕對百分比誤差（MAPE）極低，僅為0.68%，並在90天的預測中解釋了84.5%的變異（R平方 = 0.845）。這個開源管道為尼泊爾及類似市場的政策制定者和供應鏈參與者提供了一個實用、可靠的工具，以預測價格變動並加強食品安全。
2605.30720.author: Sahaj Raj Malla et.al.
